home.title: Pflegelotse Deutschland
home.subtitle: Fill route gaps with a precise fit — more margin on routes you already drive.
home.heroTitle: For <cg>relatives, patients and social services</cg>: Find the right care service — For <hl>home-care services:</hl> Routes that pay off.
home.heroSub: Pflegelotse Deutschland matches relatives and home-care services precisely — by location, time and service. Privacy-compliant and accessible.
home.heroBildAlt: Smiling, diverse team of a home-care service in uniforms
home.trust1Text: A binding answer to every request — guaranteed.
home.trust2Text: Two-pillar model, encryption, EU hosting (Art. 9 GDPR).
home.trust3Text: Large type, keyboard navigation, clear contrast (WCAG).
home.relativesText: Post your need in two steps — anonymously. Matching services respond with binding offers. Only your choice releases your contact details.
home.servicesText: One-click gap-filling: the fit score shows which client slots into an existing tour without a detour — extra margin on routes you already drive.
home.toolsTeaserText: Care-level calculator and more — no sign-up, no data sharing.

dashboard.title: Route planning
dashboard.subtitle: Today's tours and precise gap-filling
dashboard.noSelection: Pick a client on the left to see matching tours.
dashboard.noMatch: No matching tour (time window or qualification violated)
dashboard.noMatch_qualifikation: Fits no tour professionally — the carer lacks the required qualification
dashboard.noMatch_zeitfenster: Fits no tour in time — no free time slot
dashboard.noMatch_keineTouren: No tours created yet — please create a tour first
dashboard.eingaengeAnzahl: {n, plural, =0 {No matching requests} one {# matching request} other {# matching requests}}
dashboard.kvMixGesamt: {n, plural, =0 {no requests} one {# request} other {# requests}}
dashboard.kvStammTitel: Payer mix of the client base
dashboard.kvStammGesamt: {n, plural, =0 {no clients} one {# client} other {# clients}}
dashboard.kvStammLeer: No active clients with a payer yet.
dashboard.probeHinweis: Not won yet. You can plan it tentatively as a trial or make an offer to win it.
dashboard.einzugsgebietHinweis: Set location & radius to receive matching requests
dashboard.importHinweis: Import a client list from your care software (CSV/Excel)
dashboard.importDropHinweis: Drag your care-software CSV/Excel export (e.g. MediFox) here or choose a file — columns are detected automatically.

tourNeu.title: Create new tour
tourNeu.subtitle: Set the carer, day and start point — you plan the visits afterwards.
tourNeu.adresseNichtGefunden: Address not found — please be more specific.
tourNeu.fehlerPflicht: Please provide a date and a carer.
tourNeu.fehlerAdresse: Please set a start point via the address search.
tourNeu.fehlerZeit: Please provide a valid start time.
tourNeu.fehlerSpeichern: The tour could not be created. Please try again.

einzugsgebiet.title: Set service area
einzugsgebiet.subtitle: Location and radius determine within which range requests are shown to you — even without an existing tour.
einzugsgebiet.ortNichtGefunden: No match — please be more specific or pick a town from the list.
einzugsgebiet.aktuellGesetzt: A service area is already set — you can adjust it here.

import.title: Import clients
import.subtitle: Export a client list from your care software (CSV/Excel) and map the columns — no retyping. Addresses are converted to coordinates automatically.
import.dateiHinweis: Export a CSV from your software (German Excel with semicolons is fine). Nothing leaves the server except the address for geocoding.
import.zuordnungHinweis: We pre-selected matching columns — please review and adjust if needed.
import.geoNoetig: Route planning needs a location: map either "Address" (will be geocoded) or latitude and longitude.

tools.title: Free tools
tools.subtitle: Helpful calculators and overviews — free, no sign-up, no data sharing.
tools.pflegegradDesc: Estimate the possible care level (Pflegegrad) in a minute.

pflegegrad.title: Care-level calculator
pflegegrad.subtitle: Non-binding orientation based on the German assessment model (NBA).
pflegegrad.intro: The care level (Pflegegrad) determines which long-term-care benefits apply. Estimate in a few steps how strong the impairment is across six areas of life. No data is stored or transmitted.
pflegegrad.frage: How strong is the impairment in this area?
pflegegrad.disclaimer: This is a non-binding estimate and does not replace an assessment or advice. The care level is determined officially by the Medical Service.
pflegegrad.ctaLotse: Describe the need with the AI guide

praevention.title: Prevention module (§5 SGB XI / BEEP)
praevention.subtitle: Resource-oriented needs assessment during the §37(3) advisory visit.
praevention.hinweis: Not a medical diagnosis. Pseudonymous data — do not enter names.
praevention.keineEmpfehlungen: No suggestions yet — fill in the assessment and generate.
praevention.kiHinweis: The AI only phrases — the professional decision is yours.

lotse.title: AI care guide
lotse.subtitle: Describe the situation in your own words — I'll help structure the need.
lotse.intro: Hi! I'll help you describe the care need. Tell me: in which town is care needed, roughly what time of day, and what is it about (e.g. help washing, medication, shopping)?
lotse.hinweis: Not medical advice. Please don't enter names, addresses or phone numbers.
lotse.fehler: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: For the service area. Access to client data requires 2FA.
login.enrollHinweis: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app or enter the secret manually, then confirm with the 6-digit code.
login.qrHinweis: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app.
login.qrAlt: QR code for setting up two-factor authentication
login.registriertHinweis: Registration successful. Please sign in now.

registrieren.title: Register
registrieren.subtitle: Create an account — as someone looking for care, or as a home-care service.
registrieren.hinweisSuchende: For relatives, patients and social services looking for a matching care service.
registrieren.hinweisDienst: For home-care services. On first sign-in you'll set up two-factor authentication (required to access client data).
registrieren.einzugsHinweis: Determines within which range matching requests are shown to you. Adjustable later.
registrieren.ortNichtGefunden: No match — please be more specific or pick a town from the list.
registrieren.einwilligungLabel: I have read the privacy policy and consent to the processing of my data.
registrieren.fehlerAllgemein: Registration failed. Please check your input.

meineBedarfe.title: My requests
meineBedarfe.subtitle: Your posted requests and the offers received.
meineBedarfe.leer: You haven't posted a request yet.
meineBedarfe.angebote: {n, plural, =0 {No offers yet} one {# offer} other {# offers}}
meineBedarfe.zurueckziehenBestaetigen: Really withdraw this request? It will be closed.

keinMandant.title: Not yet assigned to a care service
keinMandant.text: Your account is signed in but not yet assigned to a care service (tenant). Please contact the operator to activate your access.

bedarf.uhrzeitHinweis: If given, the service schedules the visit into this time window.
bedarf.abwesenheiten: Regular times the person is away
bedarf.besonderheitenPlatzhalter: Language, preference for same-gender care, etc.
bedarf.freitextHinweis: Please do not enter names — these details are shown to services anonymously.
bedarf.kontaktTitel: Who should the care service contact?
bedarf.name: Full name
bedarf.beratungsstelle: Advisory/social service, case reference if any

markt.title: Find a care service
markt.subtitle: Describe the care need — matching services respond with an offer.
markt.ortNichtGefunden: No match — please be more specific or pick a location from the list.
markt.leistungenVorlaeufig: Provisional standard catalogue — state-specific codes to follow for production.
markt.einwilligungLabel: I consent to my information — including health data (e.g. care level) — being processed for matching (Art. 9 GDPR).
markt.hinweisAnonym: Your request is shown to matching services anonymously. You release your contact details only when you pick a service.
markt.nochKeine: No offers yet. Check back later.
markt.vergebenHinweis: You picked a service. It has now received your contact details and will get in touch.
markt.keineBedarfe: No matching open requests right now.
markt.angebotFehler: Could not submit the offer. Please try again.
markt.fitPasst: Fits tour {pk} · +{min} min detour · insert position {pos}
markt.fitKeinSlot: No free tour slot (time/qualification) — within service area
markt.noMatch_qualifikation: Fits no tour professionally — the carer lacks the required qualification
markt.noMatch_zeitfenster: Fits no tour in time — no free time slot
markt.uebernehmenFehler: Could not add. Please try again.
markt.expressHinweis: Express requests are shown to services with priority.

abo.title: SaaS subscription
abo.subtitle: Pick a plan for your service size. Cancel monthly.
abo.hinweisErstzahlung: The first payment activates the subscription; Mollie then charges monthly automatically.
